arts.ttl: Jadon Sancho sends Man United reminder with Chelsea after 'return' claim made
arts.sum: Jadon Sancho assisted twice for Chelsea amid reports of a Manchester United return

arts.ttl: Paul Scholes proven right with Andre Onana Manchester United warning after just 25 minutes
arts.sum: Manchester United goalkeeper Andre Onana is under the spotlight after his error against Lyon followed questionable comments on the French team.

arts.ttl: Man Utd fans in complete agreement on Andre Onana after dreadful error against Lyon
arts.sum: Andre Onana's error allowed Thiago Almada to open the scoring for Lyon on Thursday night after the goalkeeper had come under fire from ex-United star Nemanja Matic before the game

arts.ttl: Robbie Savage tears into Andre Onana after latest Manchester United mistake
arts.sum: Manchester United goalkeeper Andre Onana was at fault for Lyon's opener in the Europa League

arts.ttl: LIVE: Man United face stern test against Lyon in Europa League
arts.sum: All the action from the Groupama Stadium as Ruben Amorim's side face Lyon in their Europa League quarterfinal. ESPN has updates

arts.ttl: Why Ruben Amorim has named unchanged Manchester United XI for the first time vs Lyon
arts.sum: Man United head coach Ruben Amorim has named an unchanged starting line-up for the Europa League quarter-final first leg against Lyon.

arts.ttl: Manchester United star Amad shares positive injury update amid Ruben Amorim return hope
arts.sum: Latest Manchester United news as an encouraging sign on Amad's return to fitness emerges amid Ruben Amorim hope

arts.ttl: Cristiano Ronaldo makes SHOCK career move as Man United legend begins 'new chapter'
arts.sum: Cristiano Ronaldo has announced a shock career move that will see him begin a 'new chapter' away from the pitch as he enters the twilight of his playing days.

arts.ttl: Man United, Chelsea 'take the lead' in race for 22-year-old Premier League attacker
arts.sum: Manchester United and Chelsea are reportedly ahead of Everton in the race for Ipswich Town marksman Liam Delap ahead of the summer trading point.

arts.ttl: Team News: Ruben Amorim confirms Man United XI for Lyon showdown with Kobbie Mainoo decision made
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim confirms his starting side for Thursday's Europa League quarter-final first leg with Lyon in France.
